reason: Response B demonstrates the denser, more idiosyncratic observation (bubbles as "visible patience," "a record of time having passed") and a more distinctive, self-aware closing voice ("hard to justify and that I don't really try to") that reflects Opus's tendency toward specific, original framing over safe-but-generic imagery.
